query:
-- Test the join condition to see if it finds matches
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, p.product_name, p.partner_buy_price,
       ABS(s.monthlyCost - p.partner_buy_price) as diff
FROM services s
JOIN sasboss_pricebook_items p 
  ON p.version_id = 2
  AND LOWER(TRIM(s.planName)) = LOWER(TRIM(p.product_name))
WHERE 
  s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
  AND ABS(s.monthlyCost - p.partner_buy_price) > 0.005
LIMIT 10;

SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, p.product_name, p.partner_buy_price,
       ABS(s.monthlyCost - p.partner_buy_price) as diff
FROM services s
JOIN sasboss_pricebook_items p 
  ON p.version_id = 2
  AND LOWER(TRIM(s.planName)) = LOWER(TRIM(p.product_name))
WHERE 
  s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
  AND ABS(s.monthlyCost - p.partner_buy_price) > 0.005
LIMIT 10;
